---
title: "Contact"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<section class="contact-hero">

  <p class="contact-greeting">Get in Touch</p>

  <h1 class="contact-title">Let's <em>Connect</em></h1>

  <div class="contact-divider"></div>

  <p class="contact-intro">
    I'm currently open to work opportunities and collaborations.
    Whether you have a project in mind, want to talk geomatics, or just want to say hello! 
    I'd love to hear from you.
  </p>

  <!-- Location -->
  <div class="contact-location">
    <span class="location-icon">📍</span>
 <span>Vancouver, BC, Canada &nbsp;·&nbsp; Available across North America</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Links -->
  <div class="contact-links">

    <a href="mailto:cigm99@gmail.com" class="contact-card">
      <span class="contact-card-label">Email</span>
      <span class="contact-card-value">cigm99@gmail.com</span>
    </a>

    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/clarissagutierrez0812/" target="_blank" class="contact-card">
      <span class="contact-card-label">LinkedIn</span>
      <span class="contact-card-value">clarissagutierrez0812</span>
    </a>

    <a href="https://github.com/cigm99" target="_blank" class="contact-card">
      <span class="contact-card-label">GitHub</span>
      <span class="contact-card-value">cigm99</span>
    </a>

  </div>

</section>
```
